field_values.action_summary: Alice challenges the logic of the trial, prompting the Queen to order "Off with her head!" The cards fly at Alice in an overwhelming swarm. This chaotic assault triggers Alice's sudden awakening as she shrinks back to normal size.
field_values.emotional_beat: From high-stakes tension to a sudden, jarring release.
field_values.camera_intent: Low angle Queen outbursts; Kinetic flying card swarms; Seamless scale-shift match cuts
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Physical force of the cards as a kinetic mass
Sudden transition from giant Alice to human-sized Alice
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH012_SC003

## Production Intent
Establish a high-stakes courtroom confrontation where the scale of the protagonist shifts from colossal to human through a chaotic physical assault by the jury.

## Required Cast
- Alice (Giant)
- The Queen
- The Pack of Cards (The Jury/Soldiers)

## Required Environments
- The Courtroom (surreal/dreamscape)

## Continuity Constraints
- Physical force of the cards as a kinetic mass.
- Sudden transition from giant Alice to human-sized Alice.

## Beat List
1. Alice challenges the logic of the trial.
2. The Queen orders "Off with her head!"
3. The Pack of Cards flies at Alice in an overwhelming swarm.
4. Alice shrinks back to normal size as she wakes up.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
